description: §41.14.8 — <formFor for=Signup> has a struct-typed field (address: Address) WITH an explicit <slot name="address"> override. Near-miss sibling of formfor-nested-struct-no-slot: proves E-FORMFOR-NESTED-STRUCT-NO-SLOT is gated on the ABSENCE of the slot override specifically, not on the mere presence of a nested struct field.
rationale: §41.14.8: a struct-typed field WITH an explicit <slot name="<fieldName>"> override SHALL NOT fire E-FORMFOR-NESTED-STRUCT-NO-SLOT.
